overall.description: Static aerial shot from a high-rise building in a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis, focusing on a glitching digital billboard. The scene showcases dense urban architecture, waterways, and distant mountains under overcast skies, rendered in high-quality game engine graphics with vibrant neon colors.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise rooftop exterior with digital billboard overlooking cyberpunk cityscape

segments.scene_description: A static high-angle view from a skyscraper in a futuristic cyberpunk city, focusing on a large purple digital billboard displaying a 'Feel the Chemistry' advertisement that periodically glitches and refreshes. The sprawling cityscape below features dense urban development, waterways, and distant mountains under an overcast sky, with no visible pedestrian or vehicle activity from this aerial perspective.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static high-angle perspective from a skyscraper, focusing on the rhythmic instability of a digital advertisement within a sprawling cyberpunk metropolis. It begins with a centered view of a large purple billboard displaying a Feel the Chemistry advertisement that periodically glitches and refreshes. As the digital display flickers, the camera captures the vast urban development stretching beneath it, where dense architecture meets winding waterways. The scene then expands to reveal distant mountains silhouetted against a heavy, overcast sky, emphasizing the scale of the city. Finally, the view lingers on the contrast between the vibrant, malfunctioning neon lights and the stillness of the uninhabited cityscape below.
